title: I am Seele
wikitext:
[]: I am Seele Post by ShinjiIkari36_8 » Tue Oct 11, 2011 7:50 pm I am Seele. my goal is Human instrumentality, but i am not going to use the same tactics as my inspiration. I plan on linking the entire world with a complete empathetic bond that will make everyone realize the pain caused by their actions and allow them to reinvent themselves to create a world with no pain. Please comment on what you believe tell me your opinion on my organization's plan. I am being 100% SERIOUS. i am not joking.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Oct 11, 2011 7:59 pm The end result is undesirable.

[]: Post by Final Messenger » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:03 pm I like being soild and I do not want to become O.J.

[]: Post by ShinjiIkari36_8 » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:05 pm TehDonutKing wrote: The end result is undesirable.

[]: Post by User-iel » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:07 pm Instead of NGE, try an analogy from original Star Trek. Perhaps one-third of the episodes have William Shatner delivering a speech emphasizing how this just doesn't work. Before technique, please try the deep library of relevant philosophy to refine your theory of human happiness and existence. I'm sorry, but there seem to be many complications before one can even define a 'better' state for humanity. Perhaps try to end poverty / victimization first? ? in b4 ?

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:11 pm We'd no longer have a life. We left Eden long ago, why return? Pain is just as necessary to life as is peace. And there will be at least one person sadistic enough that they'd enjoy causing others pain. And if we all felt everyone else's pain, we'd all hurt too much to move. Imagine all the people on their deathbeds right now. Imagine feeling the pain of all of them as they slowly die. I understand where you're coming from, and this is an idea I briefly pondered once. It would work in an ideal world, but in an ideal world, we wouldn't need it. I also doubt the possibility.

[]: Post by ShinjiIkari36_8 » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:12 pm Final Messenger wrote: I like being soild and I do not want to become O.J.

[]: Post by Final Messenger » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:18 pm ShinjiIkari36_8 wrote: i already said that my organization is going to be different from my inspiration, the instrumentality that we work for allows everyone to be a separate entity, they just share a complete empathetic link.

[]: Post by EvangelionFan » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:21 pm

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:22 pm I think this thread was made to test how people (who know what Seele is) would react if Seele had indeed existed, and had it released its intentions to the public, instead of a troll thread. So, mind keeping this open, and being honest? Although, this would be better suited if made in the Chit-Chat forum..

[]: Post by ShinjiIkari36_8 » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:22 pm Final Messenger wrote: Well it is a nice idea (the whole complete understanding thing) but if it means other people are able to see my thoughts with out my permission I don't really like the idea.

[]: Post by KingXanaduu » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:23 pm EvangelionFan wrote:

[]: Post by ShinjiIkari36_8 » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:25 pm Stryker wrote: I think this thread was made to test how people (who know what Seele is) would react if Seele had indeed existed, and had it released its intentions to the public, instead of a troll thread. So, mind keeping this open, and being honest? Although, this would be better suited if made in the Chit-Chat forum..

[]: Post by Azathoth » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:28 pm ShinjiIkari36_8 wrote: but after the complete process of instrumentality is fulfilled you won't have dirty, evil thoughts directed at people, and you wouldn't hate anyone

[]: Post by ShinjiIkari36_8 » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:30 pm Azathoth wrote: Fuck that noise. Without dirty thoughts, what the hell is worth living for?

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:35 pm I wouldn't agree to your instrumentality, because I like my individuality and I can't stand being with so many people. I used to fear and hate being alone, but now I accept it as a daily thing, and sometimes embrace it.. To have that taken from me would be unacceptable. And anyways, I like my physical form, it looks very manly. And I love living in this world, especially with all their flaws. In the perfect reality that you mention, I wouldn't need to work to achieve it. As fun as it would be for the moment, I would rather work to get a sliver, a moment of this utopia in which I dream of, in which, I would also love to dream without people interfering with my ideas.

[]: Re: I am Seele Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:38 pm ShinjiIkari36_8 wrote: I am Seele. my goal is Human instrumentality, but i am not going to use the same tactics as my inspiration. I plan on linking the entire world with a complete empathetic bond that will make everyone realize the pain caused by their actions and allow them to reinvent themselves to create a world with no pain. Please comment on what you believe tell me your opinion on my organization's plan. I am being 100% SERIOUS. i am not joking.

[]: Post by KingXanaduu » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:43 pm Stryker wrote: And I love living in this world, especially with all their flaws. In the perfect reality that you mention, I wouldn't need to work to achieve it. As fun as it would be for the moment, I would rather work to get a sliver, a moment of this utopia in which I dream of, in which, I would also love to dream without people interfering with my ideas.

[]: Re: I am Seele Post by ShinjiIkari36_8 » Tue Oct 11, 2011 8:44 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: if you get arid of the empathetic bond bit, then your are describing the internet.
